label: New — Garden Walk
items: A guided card-by-card tour of every plant in your garden. Tap the new "Start a Garden Walk" tile at the bottom of Quick Access to begin.
Each plant gets a full-screen card with a recent photo, your last note, status chips (overdue tasks, due today, ailments, new insights from the pattern engine), and quick stats.
One-tap actions per card: Snap a photo, Note something you noticed, mark All good, Skip, or Stop the walk.

Smart ordering — plants needing attention come first (active ailments, then overdue, then due today, then anything the AI has flagged). Plants you tagged "all good" recently drop out of your walks for 7 days.
End-of-walk summary shows photos taken, notes added, tasks completed, and ailments flagged. Comes back to Quick Access in one tap.
